SECTIONS.CONTENT_1: Ak…î…îm Map of Pi app, a y…õde Pi Community ab…î no mu. Nk…îm…î Ho Mmara yi kyer…õ s…õnea y…õb…î, y…õde, na y…õda wo ho ns…õm ho adwuma w…î bere a wop…õ s…õ wok…î so di dwuma w…î y…õn app no.
SECTIONS.CONTENT_2_1_1: Bere a wop…õ s…õ wop…õy…õ s…õ …îd…îmfo, y…õb…õt…î wo din, email address, …îd…îmfo din, ne ns…õm fofor…î a …õho hia.
SECTIONS.CONTENT_2_1_2: Y…õb…õt…î wo ho ns…õm ho fa w'adwuma, …îd…îmfo mfonini ne d…îmfo ID ho ns…õm.
SECTIONS.CONTENT_2_2_1: Sellers a w…îde w…în ho gu nk…îm…î no, w…în ho hia s…õ w…îde Seller ns…õm bi a …õfiri wo ho, na …õfa Seller din, beae, na contact details.
SECTIONS.CONTENT_2_2_2: Seller no betumi ay…õ adwuma anaa …îbarima bi.
SECTIONS.CONTENT_3_1_1: Y…õde w'aho…îden no y…õ y…õn Map of Pi dwumadi mu ho adwuma, ne nk…îm…î Seller adwumadi no.

SECTIONS.HEADER_4: Nea Y…õde W'aho…îden No S…î W…îmu
SECTIONS.CONTENT_4_1_1: User ns…õm no betumi ab…î Seller mu na …õb…õy…õ nk…îm…î a …õde as…õm k…î nk…îm…î.
SECTIONS.CONTENT_4_2_1: Y…õde nk…îm…î ab…î nkabom ho k…î Service provider ho a w…îb…õhy…õ Map of Pi dwumadi so.
SECTIONS.CONTENT_5_1: Y…õde a …õw…î dwuma w…î nkabom daakye mu da wo ho ns…õm no.
SECTIONS.CONTENT_6_1: Wob…õtumi asesa wo account ns…õm w…î app no mu. Wob…õtumi asesa wo Map of Pi account no s…õ wok…î Pi Network account no mu na wop…õ s…õ wop…õ s…õ wopow wo Map of Pi data no bere a wop…õ s…õ wok…î Map of Pi so. Wubetumi asesa ho ne nk…îm…î afiri …õfiri.
SECTIONS.HEADER_7: Nk…îm…î Ho Mmara A …õho y…õ Krado
SECTIONS.CONTENT_7_1: Y…õb…õt…î nk…îm…î ho mmara a …õho y…õ krado s…õnea …õho hia. Nea …õda ho no ne nk…îm…î so ns…õnhia no.
SECTIONS.CONTENT_8_1: S…õ wow…î ns…õnhia anaa as…õm bi a, k…îfa email k…îb…î y…õn ho.

SECTIONS.CONTENT_1_1: Akwaaba k…î Map of Pi app no mu, a …õy…õ Map of Pi team no na …õw…î Pi Community no mu. Wok…î so de app no y…õ adwuma a, wopene so s…õ wubedi nk…îm…î ho mmara yi, ne y…õn Privacy Policy.
